use sqlx::{PgPool, Row};

async fn list_orders(pool: &PgPool, page: i64, per_page: i64) -> Result<Vec<Order>, sqlx::Error> {
    // BAD: separate count query on every paginated fetch
    let total: (i64,) = sqlx::query_as("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders")
        .fetch_one(pool)
        .await?;

    let offset = (page - 1) * per_page;
    let rows = sqlx::query_as::<_, Order>(
        "SELECT id, customer_id, total FROM orders ORDER BY id LIMIT $1 OFFSET $2"
    )
    .bind(per_page)
    .bind(offset)
    .fetch_all(pool)
    .await?;

    Ok(rows)
}

struct Order {
    id: i64,
    customer_id: i64,
    total: f64,
}
